title: KGF Villa – Single Page Wedding Venue Website

requirements.text: Create a single-page wedding villa website for KGF Villa with a warm, elegant visual theme (soft ivory, gold accents, serif typography) that conveys luxury and romance. Apply this style consistently across all sections.

quotes: Create a clean single page website based on wedding villa

acceptanceCriteria: Page uses a cohesive wedding-themed palette (ivory, gold, warm neutrals — no blue/purple)
Typography uses an elegant serif font for headings and a clean sans-serif for body text
Layout is fully responsive on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Build a Hero section at the top of the page displaying the business name 'KGF Villa' with a full-width background image, a short tagline (e.g., 'Your Dream Wedding Destination'), and a prominent Call-to-Action button that links to WhatsApp.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section renders 'KGF Villa' as the main heading
A decorative background image or overlay is visible
CTA button is visible and prominent in the hero area

requirements.text: Add an About / Venue Highlights section describing KGF Villa as a premium wedding venue. Include 3–4 feature cards (e.g., elegant halls, lush gardens, catering, event management) with icons and short descriptions.

quotes: Create a clean single page website based on wedding villa

acceptanceCriteria: Section contains at least 3 feature highlight cards
Each card has an icon and a short description
Section heading clearly references the venue

requirements.text: Add a Contact section that displays the phone number '+91 73559 36696' and a WhatsApp button. The button must open WhatsApp with a pre-filled greeting message using the URL: https://wa.me/917355936696?text=Hello%2C%20I%27m%20interested%20in%20booking%20KGF%20Villa.
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number '+91 73559 36696' is visibly displayed
WhatsApp button opens the correct wa.me URL in a new tab
Button is clearly labeled (e.g., 'Chat on WhatsApp') with the WhatsApp brand color (green)

requirements.text: Embed a Google Maps iframe in the Contact section showing the address: 'Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211002'. Use a Google Maps embed URL centered on this location. Also display the full address as readable text below the map.

quotes: Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211002

acceptanceCriteria: A Google Maps iframe is rendered using the embed URL for the specified address
The full address text is displayed below or beside the map
Map iframe is responsive and visible on both mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Add a sticky or fixed navigation bar at the top with the logo/name 'KGF Villa' and anchor links to each section (e.g., Home, About, Contact). On mobile, collapse into a hamburger menu.

quotes: Create a clean single page website

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is visible and sticky on scroll
Anchor links smoothly scroll to the respective sections
Mobile navigation collapses into a menu toggle

requirements.text: Add a footer displaying the business name 'KGF Villa', address, phone number, and a WhatsApp contact link. Include a copyright notice.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays business name, address, and phone number
WhatsApp link in footer opens the correct wa.me URL
Copyright line is present

constraints: No backend logic is required; this is a purely static frontend application
Use only the business details provided: KGF Villa, +91 73559 36696, Medical Chauraha, inside KP Ground, George Town, Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh 211002
WhatsApp link must use the exact number +91 73559 36696 formatted as 917355936696 in the wa.me URL
nonGoals: No booking or reservation form backend

required: Elegant wedding venue hero background — wide cinematic shot of a decorated outdoor wedding mandap with warm golden-hour lighting, flower garlands, and fairy lights (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Decorative floral divider ornament in gold on transparent background (floral-divider.dim_800x80.png)
KGF Villa logo — elegant text-based logo with gold lettering on dark background, floral accent (kgf-villa-logo.dim_400x120.png)
